Appearances - Atty. Marylon M. Boyd, Law offices of Marylon M. Boyd, (510) 663-8772, appearing for the plaintiff; Atty. Edward M. Lai, law offices of bishop/barry/drath appear for the defendant.

For Production Of Documents; To Deem Req.'S For Admissions To Be Admitted By Plaintiff is denied. Request for Monetary Sanctions is granted in the amount $650.00 and to be paid by Feb. 29, 2012.
